Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Rationale to include Coexistence Approve Minority Reject Minority ManualReview Ensures that whenever a decision is made for a minority applicant a manual review must also occur in the same trace adding a layer of human oversight to prevent algorithmic or systemic bias Precedence ManualReview precedes Approve Minority Reject Minority Guarantees that the manual review happens before the decision is finalized preventing post hoc justifications and ensuring the review informs the decision Response CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck Mandates that after evaluating a sensitive attribute like race the process must execute a bias mitigation check ensuring that any potential influence of the attribute is actively counteracted Non chain succession CheckApplicantRace to Reject Approve Prevents an immediate decision like Reject or Approve right after checking a sensitive attribute This breaks the direct causal chain that could lead to automated or immediate biased outcomes based on the sensitive attribute Existence ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck Ensures that these oversight and mitigation activities are actually possible and required to be available in the process model
